untranslatable_reason: Signal requires lagged monthly excess returns scaled by ex ante volatility across multiple horizons (1-12 months). The allowed indicators set lacks: (1) multi-horizon lagged returns (only current-period returns available), (2) excess return calculation (requires benchmark subtraction), (3) ex ante volatility scaling (only historical volatility measures available). The signal's core logic of momentum reversal based on scaled excess returns cannot be accurately expressed without custom derived indicators.
translation_notes: This signal is a sophisticated multi-horizon momentum strategy that requires forward-looking volatility estimates and excess return calculations beyond the scope of standard OHLCV-derived indicators. A proxy using raw returns sign was provided but does not capture the scaling and lookback complexity of the original rule.
